notes: Adopted from template v1.0.0 -> v1.8.0 in a single parity pass.
Constitution upgraded to schemaVersion 2 / v2.2.0 with structured rules, rationale, and new articles.
Template manifest upgraded to v1.8.0 with full version history notes.
Added observability-logging.md and repository-security-hooks.md shared instructions.
Added .pii-allowlist with standard placeholder patterns.
Hook coverage aligned with the template for curated PII, env leak scanning, and ggshield while preserving scripts/ as the implementation surface.
Added the template's dedicated Gitleaks and Semgrep GitHub Actions workflows for CI-side secret and configuration analysis.
Added the template's GGShield audit workflow, repo-owned .gitleaks.toml baseline, local pre-push Gitleaks and Semgrep hooks, and CI replay of the security pre-push policy.
v1.11.0: Added DC-3 license-declaration constitutional rule to documentation article.
v1.12.0: Added SH-4 through SH-9 application-security constitutional rules (path containment, loopback binding, TLS verification, header credentials, CSP, config-gated diagnostics).
v1.13.0: Promoted gitleaks to pre-commit hook, ggshield to pre-push hook; added .ggshield.yml with aligned exclusions.
v1.14.0: Added well-known DNS resolver IPs to .pii-allowlist; merged template generic path exclusions into .gitleaks.toml; added .github/workflows/ to check-yaml exclude.
v1.15.0: Added Publish-ToPublicRepo.ps1 clean-room publish script and .publish-exclude.example.
v1.16.0: Updated Publish-ToPublicRepo.ps1 with dotfile allowlist, robocopy pre-exclusion, PII scan auto-detect, optional RemoteUrl for local mode, and .publish-exclude.example comment update.

v1.16.0 reconcile follow-up: adopted the current template metadata schema, git workflow guidance, issue forms, Semgrep custom rules, promotion freshness workflow, and template metadata validation script.

v1.17.0–v1.22.0: Adopted adopter-hook-patterns.md, public-mirror-guard.md, mirrored-release-workflow.md, iac-patterns.md, language-ecosystem-patterns.md, codeql-configuration-patterns.md shared instructions. Migrated manifest to schemaVersion 2.

v1.23.0: Adopted New-CleanRoomCopy.ps1 and Publish-ToMirror.ps1 two-step publish safety workflow. Added .publish-config.json with sanctioned remote enforcement. Replaced Publish-ToPublicRepo.ps1 with deprecated wrapper. Added Compare-TemplateSpec.ps1 and migrate-manifest-schema.ps1.

v1.24.0: Deleted deprecated Publish-ToPublicRepo.ps1. Constitution bumped to v2.7.0 with agentBehavior article (AG-1..AG-4), SH-10 prompt-injection rule, OB-5, TS-4, IP-4, IP-5. Adopted prompt-injection scanning hook (hooks/check-prompt-injection.ps1), hallucination quality gates (hooks/check-hallucinations.ps1), agent attestation framework (.squad/templates/, .instructions/shared/agent-attestation.md, scripts/append-agent-provenance.ps1, hooks/validate-agent-trailers.ps1). Expanded env-leak scanner with identity vars, vault/tool-path keywords, username-in-path detection, and lockfile skips. Added commit-msg stage to .pre-commit-config.yaml.

v1.25.0: Adopted mandatory ESLint pre-push gate (hooks/eslint-pre-push.ps1) wired through .pre-commit-config.yaml at the pre-push stage with always_run: true, pass_filenames: false. JS/TS-aware: no-op for non-JS adopters; honors only explicit TEMPLATE_SKIP_LINT=1 emergency override (separate from any slow-suite skip flag). Mirrors CI npm run lint locally so passing CI lint with failing local lint can no longer slip through. Severity policy delegated to repo lint script (currently `eslint`). hookStandardVersion (1.4.0) and constitution (v2.9.0) remain ahead of template baseline (1.3.0 / 2.7.0); not regressed. Drift backlog (missing canonical .instructions/shared/* and hooks/* files claimed in v1.17.0..v1.22.0 notes, .pii-file-allowlist, etc.) deferred to a follow-up adoption pass per TG-1 (versioned deltas, no wholesale replace) — tracked in internal issue #217. Reconciliation advisories: two minor robustness improvements applied locally to hooks/eslint-pre-push.ps1 (& $npm dispatch + .mts/.cts flat-config candidates); tracked upstream in template issue #63 with a recorded localDeviation.

v1.26.0–v1.31.0: Shared instruction alignment pass. Created 6 missing shared instruction files that were deferred from the v1.17.0–v1.22.0 adoption notes: adopter-hook-patterns.md, public-mirror-guard.md, mirrored-release-workflow.md, iac-patterns.md, language-ecosystem-patterns.md, codeql-configuration-patterns.md. Added cross-reference sections to all existing shared instructions (repository-security-hooks, template-adoption-workflow, index-server-bootstrap, git-workflow, observability-logging). Updated layered hook model numbering to include ESLint, prompt-injection, hallucination, and agent-attestation hooks. Added shared instruction reference section to CONTRIBUTING.md. Closes drift backlog from issue #217 for shared instruction surfaces.

v1.26.0–v1.28.0: Adopted CodeQL local scan artifact exclusion (.codeql/ in .gitignore). Adopted squad agent charter and decision record templates (.squad/templates/). Content-type taxonomy expanded to eight types (canonical list in schemas/instruction.schema.json properties.contentType.enum — derived everywhere via src/models/instruction.ts). Messaging system (messaging_* tools) integrated into tool registry.

v1.29.0–v1.30.0: Adopted SQLite storage backend with sqlite-vec vector embedding support. Docker configuration updated for glibc-vs-musl awareness (BASE_IMAGE build arg). Dev-server scripts reorganized into semantic subdirectory taxonomy (build/, ci/, dev/, diagnostics/, governance/, testing/, perf/, migration/).

v1.31.0: Repo config alignment pass — README tool count updated from 40+ to 50+ (actual inventory ~60 tools), template-manifest.json bumped with v1.26–v1.31 version notes and new managed file entries (Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, codecov.yml, .devsandbox/.gitignore). Clobber-detection awareness documented for parallel workstream coordination.

v1.27.0–v1.31.0: Constitution bumped to v2.10.0 with SH-11 (adversarial test fixtures), enriched DI-4 with structured required/prohibited/evidence fields, updated enforcedBy paths for SH-1..SH-3 and SH-10 to reference hooks/* and specific workflow files. Updated CD-1/CD-2/CD-4/TS-4 enforcedBy to specific workflow names. Added precommitWorkflow and license to references. Template manifest updated to v1.31.0 with 32 new managed files. All repo-specific rules (S-3, S-4, A-1..A-7, OB-6, TS-5..TS-12, G-6, PB-1..PB-6, CQ-1..CQ-7, DI-1..DI-3, thresholds) preserved per TG-1.

localDeviations.deviation: PII and env-leak scanning remain in scripts/hooks/pre-commit.ps1 and are exposed through the template-compatible hooks/check-dotenv-leaks.ps1 wrapper; additional hooks (prompt-injection, hallucination, agent-trailers) remain registered as standalone entries in hooks/.
Not adopted as a tracked allowlist file. This repo's stricter dotenv policy treats path-shaped .env values as PII and hook regressions intentionally reject .env-leak-allowlist files.
Implemented as a thin wrapper around the repo's consolidated scripts/hooks/pre-commit.ps1 scanner so the template-managed hook path exists without duplicating scanner logic.
Implemented as a thin wrapper around scripts/hooks/run-codeql-pre-push.ps1 to preserve the repo's categorized script layout while exposing the canonical template hook path.
Implemented as a thin wrapper around scripts/hooks/setup-hooks.ps1 to preserve the repo's categorized script layout while exposing the canonical template setup path.
instructions/ remains the checked-in runtime instruction catalog; .instructions/ is reserved for repo-local guidance.
The Node entry point sync-constitution.cjs remains the source implementation, with scripts/sync-constitution.ps1 as the template-compatible wrapper.
The precommit.yml workflow replays the dedicated security pre-push hooks directly; the existing repo-local slow pre-push suite remains enforced by its own workflow surfaces.
The template auto-tag workflow is intentionally not adopted because this repository's git tags represent product releases rather than templateVersion milestones.
Validates the repo's consolidated scripts/pre-commit.ps1 behavior rather than canonical hooks/* entry points.
Not yet adopted — CI constitution validation is handled by existing pre-commit and build-time checks.

Two minor robustness improvements applied locally pending upstream merge: (1) invoke the CommandInfo directly (& $npm) instead of & $npm.Source so PowerShell dispatch handles paths/aliases/functions uniformly; (2) added eslint.config.mts and eslint.config.cts to the flat-config candidate list (ESLint v9 supports both). Tracked upstream in template issue #63 — revert to byte-identical template source when the template repo merges the fix.
